title: Saccus glaucescens
taxonomy: Saccus glaucescens is classified within the family Asparagaceae. It belongs to the order Asparagales and the class Liliopsida. Further classification places it within the genus Saccus, which is a monotypic genus. Saccus glaucescens is native to the Mediterranean region and is often associated with the flora of the Iberian Peninsula. The exact classification may be subject to ongoing research and updates in botanical classification systems.
